transcription.text: According to legend, little folk know, Hills is where the toys are. Me afraid of ghosts, not with my proton gut, wham, wham. I capture pesky ghosts with this ghost trap, from Blastin' Em, the Ecto Popper and Goggles. For a little help, I call these heroes, all from Kenner. Hills is my kind of place, because, Hills is where the toys are. At low prices, every day.
